inventory.list_subhead: Stock per variant. Adjust counts on receipts, shrinkage, or audits.
inventory.stock_unknown_help: Stock will appear after the first adjustment.
inventory.empty.title: No variants yet.
inventory.empty.body: Add products and variants first to start managing stock.
inventory.error.title: Could not load inventory.
inventory.error.body: Something went wrong loading the variant list. Please try again.
inventory.adjust.title: Adjust stock
inventory.adjust.subhead: Enter a signed change. Positive numbers add stock, negative numbers remove it.
inventory.adjust.delta_help: An integer between -1,000,000 and 1,000,000, and not zero.
inventory.adjust.reason_help: For your team's records. Not yet persisted to the server-side audit log in v0.1.
inventory.adjust.error.invalid: Change must be a non-zero integer between -1,000,000 and 1,000,000.
inventory.adjust.error.server: Could not save the adjustment right now. Please try again.
inventory.adjust.error.would_go_negative: This adjustment would drive stock below zero.
inventory.no_endpoint_notice: The v0.1 API does not yet expose a stock read endpoint or audit log. The variant list comes from the products endpoint; stock counts only appear after an adjustment. See the “Implement inventory adjustment endpoints with audit logging” item in docs/v0.1-checklist.md.
